case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A VS. DONNA M HENDERSON

docket_entries.description: FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF ANSWER BY DEFENDANT DONNA M HENDERSON ON 08/29/18 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDERSON, DONNA M $2,771.31 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,065.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100038680)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-12-2018 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DONNA HENDERSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
